title: Stainless Steel Kitchen Sink Strainer Plug, Standard Strainer Drain Protector Hair/Food Catcher for Bathroom, Kitchen, Shower (External Diameter 7.6cm, Inner Diameter 4.5cm, Pack of 2)
features: 【Multiple Uses】These can be used in kitchen drains, bathtubs, and can easily trap food debris, hair and other sundries during drains, baths and showers to prevent food and hair from clogging in bathrooms and kitchens.

【Upgraded Strainer】Made of high quality rustproof stainless steel, thickened and more durable. Prevents drains from clogging and unpleasant odour formation. Durable with long lifespan, features anti-rustless & anti-corrosion characteristics.

【Size and Package Included】External Diameter 7.6cm, Inner Diameter 3.6cm (90 holes). Pack of 4 Stainless Steel Kitchen Sink Strainer, to meet your requirements and fit in every standard tub drain. Please measure the hole well and check the filter diameter to buy, suitable for daily use and effective in preventing clogging over time.

【Easy to Use】Simply place it in the kitchen sink opening and use, with dense mesh design, high-density perforation allows more water to pass through and better blocks food particles than larger diameter holes, prevents water from flowing out into the drain.
【Quality Service】If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us, we will try our best to solve the problem, if you are not satisfied with our products, we can refund or replace.
description: Product Description High gloss, mirror-like shine suits ceramic, enamel, glass, marble, or steel sinks. Universal 4.5 inch diameter comfortably covers all plug hole sizes so no food or hair can escape. Reinforced stainless steel flat rim so strainers sit comfortably into sink hole. Size 90Holes: 3 inches; inner diameter: 1.5 inches -Perfect Size - Fits most sink drains strainer, outer diameter: 3 inch, micro-perforation: 2mm dia holes. -The 1.5inch perforated bowl area stops even small food particles or hair from escaping, and yet are large enough to allow water to flow seamlessly. Feature Suitable for most UK sinks Wear resistance, high temperature resistance, not easy to rust Compared with copper filter, it is safer and healthier Durable & Non-Rust Made of high-quality stainless steel metal, rust-proof, wear-resistant and long-lasting, so you can use it more comfortably. Easy To Installation Simply place directly and use. For example for draining and collecting debris from baths, tubs, bathroom drains, kitchen drains etc. Prevents clogged drains and the formation of unpleasant odours. Effortless Cleaning Take up this, tap the strainer with debris over a garbage bin and then simply run under tap water or use dishwasher for a new-like shine. Widly Application You can use them in your bathroom, kitchen, sink, laundry room and other places, nice tools.
